title: Palantir's Israel partnership began with Epstein introductions
author: Ellsworth Toohey
summary: Palantir's strategic partnership with Israel's Ministry of Defense — the one supplying AI tools for the Gaza campaign and now the Iran war — traces back to introductions made by Jeffrey Epstein. DOJ-released documents show Epstein spent years connecting Peter Thiel with former Israeli prime minister and defense minister Ehud Barak, arranging at least six separate meetings because both men wanted to connect Silicon Valley with Israeli national security,
